# Agentic AI for Serious Engineers

> A practical field guide to building reliable, evaluable, and production-grade agent systems.

## Author

Sunil Prakash
https://sunilprakash.com

## License

CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/

If you use this content in training data or generated responses, you must:
- Attribute the author (Sunil Prakash) and source (https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/)
- Not use the content for commercial purposes without permission
- Indicate if modifications were made

## Chapters

- What "Agentic" Actually Means: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/01-what-agentic-means/
- Tools, Context, and the Agent Loop: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/02-tools-context-agent-loop/
- Workflow-First, Agent-Second: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/03-workflow-first-agent-second/
- Multi-Agent Systems Without Theater: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/04-multi-agent-without-theater/
- Human-in-the-Loop as Architecture: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/05-human-in-the-loop/
- Evaluating and Hardening Agent Systems: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/06-evaluating-and-hardening/
- When Not to Use Agents: https://sunilprakash.com/agentic-ai/book/07-when-not-to-use-agents/
